empty.title: No canned responses found
empty.description: Create a new canned response to accelerate your customer's response.

new.title: New Canned Response
new.description: Create a new canned response to accelerate your customer's response.

edit.title: Edit Canned Response
edit.description: Edit the information of the canned response.

shortCode.label: Code
shortCode.hint: Unique code to identify this response. Use only letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: Enter the content of the canned response...
content.hint: Content of the response that will be sent automatically.

attachments.label: Attachments (Images, Audios, Videos, Documents)
attachments.hint: Maximum 10MB per file. Formats: images, audios, videos, PDF, DOC

variables.title: Available Variables:
variables.clickToInsert: Click a variable to insert it into the content.

validation.shortCodeMinLength: Code must be at least 2 characters
validation.shortCodeInvalid: Code must contain only letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
validation.contentMinLength: Content must be at least 10 characters

delete.title: Delete Canned Response
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the canned response "{{shortCode}}"? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDelete.title: Delete Canned Responses
bulkDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} canned response(s) selected? This action cannot be undone.
